name: Mimicry Trap
description: Notes In most situations, the decoys don’t last enough to be helpful. It also has a large cooldown and low damage, relegating it to a vanity item. It could be used with good timing and in certain situations, but the rarity of the Prismimic boss outside of events makes it impractical.
effects: Creates a centered decoy for as long as the trap remains untriggered. On enemies: Inflicts Slowed for 3.5 (+0.1 per WIS over 42) seconds
Inflicts Slowed for 2 (+0.1s per WIS over 42) seconds
